name: Merge Factory Idle
description: Merge Factory Idle is a relaxing merge and idle game where players combine machines to build a powerful production factory. Drag and merge identical machines to create stronger industrial units that generate more coins. Expand your factory, unlock advanced machines, and watch your production grow automatically. With satisfying merge animations and endless upgrades, this casual factory simulator offers a fun and rewarding idle experience.
instructions: Merge machines to build a powerful factory and generate endless coins in this addictive idle merge game
